name: Primoris Services Corp
business: Primoris Services Corporation provides critical infrastructure services primarily in the United States and Canada. It operates through two segments: Utilities and Energy. The Utilities segment specializes in construction and maintenance of natural gas and electric utility distribution and transmission systems and communications systems, while the Energy segment provides engineering, procurement, construction, and maintenance services for energy, renewable energy, and industrial customers.
namedCustomers: Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development

exposures.sentence: The Utilities segment operates throughout the United States and specializes in a range of services, including the construction and maintenance of new and existing natural gas and electric utility distribution and transmission systems, and communications systems.
